mapper.select: /* SQL ID : TkexamAnswShtDAO.qstnTkexamAnswShtCtsList 설 명 : 문항시험응시답안목록조회 */ SELECT EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID , EXAMPPR.QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ , ANSW_SHT.ANSW_SHT_CTS , (SELECT QSTN_VWITM_DSPLY_SEQ FROM TB_LMS_EXAMPPR WHERE QSTN_ID = #{qstnId} AND EXAMPPR_ID = #{exampprId}) AS BASE_DSPLY_SEQNO , ANSW_SHT.SCR FROM TB_LMS_EXAMPPR EXAMPPR JOIN TB_LMS_TKEXAM_ANSW_SHT ANSW_SHT ON EXAMPPR.EXAMPPR_ID = ANSW_SHT.EXAMPPR_ID AND EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID = ANSW_SHT.QSTN_ID WHERE EXAMPPR.QSTN_ID = #{qstnId}
